nasb.text: sound in speech which is beyond reproach, so that the opponent will be put to shame, having nothing bad to say about us.

esv.text: and sound speech that cannot be condemned, so that an opponent may be put to shame, having nothing evil to say about us.

cnv.text: 言詞要純正，無可指摘，使反對的人因為無從毀謗，就自覺慚愧。

ccb.text: 言语纯全、无可指责，让那些反对的人无话可说、自觉羞愧。

csbs.text: 要用无可指责的健全话语，使反对的人在我们的事上因没有坏话可说，就感到羞愧。
